title: I Blew My Funded Account Ignoring This One Thing
description: POV: You finally get a funded account… then blow it in 3 days. Sound familiar? Here's the ONE thing smart money traders check that beginners skip every single time. Fair value gaps changed everything. Follow R2F Trading for daily ICT setups.
script: You passed the funded challenge. Day 3… account blown. 87% of funded traders fail in the first week. You skipped one check. POV: You entered a trade. Looked clean. But price hit an unfilled fair value gap above you. Smart money needed that liquidity. You were the exit. Before every entry — check for open fair value gaps in the draw. If price needs to fill one above you? Wait. Let smart money show its hand first. One habit. Saved my funded account. Follow R2F Trading — ICT setups every single day.
